items.title: Food Additive Permit Data Query
items.authority: Taiwan Food and Drug Administration / Consumer Knowledge Service Network

evidence.excerpt: Official TFDA Consumer Knowledge Service Network page for Food Additive Permit Data Query. The live URL is a dynamic official lookup page and may return generic resource text to automated HTTP clients, so LabelPass stores this manual extract as the searchable evidence anchor while retaining the official URL for verification. Use this source when a label, product specification, import file, supplier declaration, or product registration document mentions a food additive permit, food additive registration, food additive license number, permit number, registration number, inspection registration, 登錄碼, 許可證字號, 登記證, 食品添加物許可證, 食品添加物登錄碼, 食品添加物查驗登記, 食品添加物許可證字號, 식품첨가물 허가 조회, 식품첨가물 허가번호, or 식품첨가물 등록번호.

items.title: GC453 Tariff Database Download

evidence.excerpt: Official CPT Single Window / Customs Administration page GC453 Tariff Database Download. The page is a browser-oriented official download page for Taiwan tariff and CCC-code reference data. It identifies the CCC CODE last modification date and presents official download options for tariff and commodity-code work. Listed resources include Tariff Schedule files in spreadsheet, PDF, and open-document formats; CCC Code and Description of Goods files in text and PDF formats; chapter-by-chapter tariff materials; Application for Import Goods Advance Tariff Rulings files in document, PDF, and open-document formats; and Tariff No. and Description of Goods files in text and PDF formats. The page is re

items.title: Import and Export Regulations by CCC Code

evidence.excerpt: Official Taiwan International Trade Administration/MOEA database page for Classification of Commodities and Regulations. The English interface is titled Import and Export Regulations and supports searching by commodity code, commodity code range, or imported file. It accepts HS code inputs from 2 to 6 digits and CCC code inputs under the Standard Classification of Commodities of the Republic of China up to 10 digits, with examples including 01, 2001, 740729, 0203120000, and 2207101010. The page also supports commodity-description keyword search, such as fish, bovine animals, or chemical, and regulation-code search for import or export regulation types. items.title: Food Additive Permit Data Query
items.authority: Taiwan Food and Drug Administration / Consumer Knowledge Service Network

evidence.excerpt: Official TFDA Consumer Knowledge Service Network page for Food Additive Permit Data Query. The live URL is a dynamic official lookup page and may return generic resource text to automated HTTP clients, so LabelPass stores this manual extract as the searchable evidence anchor while retaining the official URL for verification. Use this source when a label, product specification, import file, supplier declaration, or product registration document mentions a food additive permit, food additive registration, food additive license number, permit number, registration number, inspection registration, 登錄碼, 許可證字號, 登記證, 食品添加物許可證, 食品添加物登錄碼, 食品添加物查驗登記, 食品添加物許可證字號, 식품첨가물 허가 조회, 식품첨가물 허가번호, or 식품첨가물 등록번호.

evidence.excerpt: 食品原料整合查詢平臺_消費者專區 跳到主要內容區塊 專區首頁 食品藥物管理署 ::: 專區首頁 網站導覽 食品藥物管理署 食品 核可資料查詢 食品原料整合查詢平臺 邊境檢驗不符合食品資訊查詢 食品法規查詢 HACCP 查詢 吃的健康 食品相關法規暨解釋彙編查詢 西藥 產品回收 通過GMP核准之國外藥廠名單 檢驗方法查詢 食品藥物管理署官網業務專區 食品藥物管理署官網法規資訊 化粧品禁限用成分管理規定 人體器官保存庫 保存庫許可通過名單查詢 【暫停服務公告】 為配合本署資訊機房資安設備更換及網路架構調整作業，預計自109年12月13日(日)8時至19時，暫停本專區各項服務，造成不便，敬請見諒。 --> ::: 首頁 > 整合查詢服務 > 食品 > 食品原料整合查詢平臺 食品原料整合查詢平臺 ► 展開 本平臺非正面表列，並非平臺未載列品項即不得供為食品原料使用！ 使用前請詳閱以下使用說明及注意事項 1. 本平臺匯集歷年之原料食用安全性評估結果、為民服務信箱之常見問題及相關解釋令函等資訊，於 111 年 6 月 21 日將原「可供食品使用原料彙整一覽表」改版為「食品原料整合查詢平臺」，新增「草木本植物類 (3) 辛香調味料」以及「未確認安全性尚不得使用之原料」等分類，供各界人士查閱參考。 2. 本平臺為查詢資料庫，提供食品原料相關資料檢索，惟無法逐一羅列所有傳統食品原料 ( 如雞鴨魚肉、蔬菜水果及五穀雜糧等 ) ，其所列載品項，未來若科學研究顯示有食用安全疑慮時，本署將重新評估審核其食用安全性。 3. 使用 本平臺 時，建請多加利用原料之中、英文名稱或學名等部分關鍵字進行搜尋，如有搜

items.title: Import and Export Regulations by CCC Code

evidence.excerpt: Official Taiwan International Trade Administration/MOEA database page for Classification of Commodities and Regulations. The English interface is titled Import and Export Regulations and supports searching by commodity code, commodity code range, or imported file. It accepts HS code inputs from 2 to 6 digits and CCC code inputs under the Standard Classification of Commodities of the Republic of China up to 10 digits, with examples including 01, 2001, 740729, 0203120000, and 2207101010. The page also supports commodity-description keyword search, such as fish, bovine animals, or chemical, and regulation-code search for import or export regulation types. The form refers to Import Regulation co
